title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
